name: ads-meta
description: Meta Ads deep analysis covering Facebook, Instagram, and Threads advertising in the Andromeda + GEM + Lattice era. Evaluates 50 checks across Pixel/CAPI health, creative diversity and Entity-ID clustering risk, account structure, ASC/AAC defaults for Sales/Leads/App, and audience targeting. Includes Advantage+ assessment and creative-as-targeting scoring. Use when user says Meta Ads, Facebook Ads, Instagram Ads, Threads ads, Advantage+, ASC, AAC, Andromeda, GEM, Lattice, Entity-ID clustering, cr
author: AgriciDaniel
summary_zh: 这是一个Meta广告深度诊断工具，帮你在新算法下全面排查数据追踪、素材风险和账号结构等隐患，适合投手优化投放设置、避开封号雷区并提升转化效果。
